title: Moist Velvety German Apple Pudding
description: A light and earthy German dessert featuring demerara sugar and apples, cooked in a papillote to preserve freshness and flavor.

ingredients.name: demerara sugar
ingredients.notes: raw sugar adds depth to the pudding

instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together demerara sugar, flour, and vanilla extract.
In a separate bowl, whisk together heavy cream and eggs.
Add the sliced apples to the sugar mixture and toss until they are evenly coated.
Add the cream mixture to the apple mixture and stir until just combined.
Spoon the pudding mixture onto the center of each parchment paper sheet.
Dot the top of each pudding with butter.
Fold the parchment paper over the pudding to create a papillote and bake for 25 minutes.
Remove the puddings from the oven and let them cool for 10 minutes.
Serve the puddings warm, garnished with additional sliced apples if desired.
